concept: Claude will analyze the inspiration reel and write the original Masonry script here. The frames below are the second-by-second reference.
caption:
Comment “FILM” to get my AI SOLO FILMMAKER GUIDE in your DMs 💥⬇️

I used to spend nights model-hopping between Midjourney, Kling, and Sora just to land one consistent shot. The character would shift between frames, the lighting would flip, and the storyboard I had in my head never came out the same way twice.

Then I dropped a single brief into @lovart.ai . The Narrative Storyboard Skill 🎬 built every frame of my film on one canvas. Hero frame, every angle, every variation, same character and same world locked across the whole sequence.

From there, Multi-Angles ⚡ rotates the camera without re-prompting. Kling and Seedance render the cinematic video right on the same canvas. No app-switching. No regeneration loops. No model-hopping.

The bottleneck was never the model. It was always the storyboard.

#lovart #lovartai #aifilmmaker
notes: Auto-scaffolded by automation/process-reel.js. Run the creative step (automation/CREATIVE-STEP.md) to write the beats, then flip status to draft.
